narrative:
Scioto County has 42,589 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a clear Republican lean of 9.0 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 28.4% of registrants.
